description: A POS system glitch caused a batch of rental payments to be recorded as $0.01 instead of the correct rental rate. Audit and fix this data in the Sakila database by creating a view named 'v_audit_underpayments' that identifies all completed rentals where the payment amount is strictly less than the film's rental rate. The view must include columns: payment_id, rental_id, amount, rental_rate, and difference. Export the results of this view to /home/ga/Documents/exports/underpayment_audit.csv. Update the payment.amount for these records to match the film.rental_rate, ensuring that only incorrect records are modified and no valid payments or late fees are overwritten. Verify the fix by ensuring the view returns no rows.
